text: Behold, a virgin shall be with child, and shall bring forth a son, and they shall call his name Emmanuel.

gcb.mirror: The gospel reveals God entering history rather than remaining distant.
gcb.water: Incarnation orders promise into fulfillment.
gcb.fire: The coming of Christ burns through unbelief and expectation alike.

text: Thy kingdom come. Thy will be done in earth, as it is in heaven.

gcb.mirror: Prayer reveals whether the heart truly desires God's rule.
gcb.water: The kingdom orders life under heaven's will.
gcb.fire: Kingdom prayer burns away self-sovereignty.

text: The time is fulfilled, and the kingdom of God is at hand: repent ye, and believe the gospel.

gcb.mirror: Fulfillment reveals that God's timing governs redemptive history.
gcb.water: Repentance and belief prepare the soul for the kingdom.
gcb.fire: The gospel confronts delay and indecision.

text: He shall be great, and shall be called the Son of the Highest: and the Lord God shall give unto him the throne of his father David.

gcb.mirror: Christ reveals the true heir of kingdom promise.
gcb.water: The Davidic line is clarified in Jesus.
gcb.fire: Messianic fulfillment burns through political reductionism.

text: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.

gcb.mirror: Christ reveals that the beginning itself is personal and divine.
gcb.water: The Word orders creation and redemption into one story.
gcb.fire: The divinity of Christ burns through every diminished view of Him.

text: For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son.

gcb.mirror: Love reveals the costliness of salvation.
gcb.water: The gift of the Son cleanses the meaning of divine love.
gcb.fire: The cross-bound gift burns through unbelief.

text: I will pour out of my Spirit upon all flesh.

gcb.mirror: The Church reveals the overflow of prophetic promise into history.
gcb.water: The Spirit gathers and empowers a people.
gcb.fire: Pentecost ignites witness.

text: The just shall live by faith.

gcb.mirror: The gospel reveals righteousness received, not achieved.
gcb.water: Faith orders the soul under grace rather than self-justification.
gcb.fire: Justification burns through boasting.

text: For even Christ our passover is sacrificed for us.

gcb.mirror: Christ reveals the Passover pattern fulfilled.
gcb.water: Sacrifice clarifies deliverance.
gcb.fire: The Lamb burns through old categories by fulfilling them.

text: If any man be in Christ, he is a new creature.

gcb.mirror: Union with Christ reveals transformation at the deepest level.
gcb.water: New creation cleanses identity from the inside out.
gcb.fire: The old self is burned away in Christ.

text: The just shall live by faith.

gcb.mirror: Grace reveals that life with God cannot be earned by law.
gcb.water: Faith reorders covenant participation around promise.
gcb.fire: Grace burns through legal boasting.

text: For by grace are ye saved through faith.

gcb.mirror: Salvation reveals the generosity of God, not the sufficiency of man.
gcb.water: Grace cleanses salvation from works-righteousness.
gcb.fire: Grace burns through self-credit.

text: At the name of Jesus every knee should bow.

gcb.mirror: The exaltation of Christ reveals the true center of worship.
gcb.water: Lordship reorders all allegiance.
gcb.fire: Every rival authority is burned away before Christ.

text: For by him were all things created.

gcb.mirror: Christ reveals that creation and redemption belong to one Lord.
gcb.water: All things find order in Him.
gcb.fire: The supremacy of Christ burns through fragmented theology.

text: For the Lord himself shall descend from heaven with a shout.

gcb.mirror: Hope reveals whether the Church truly awaits the Lord.
gcb.water: The promise steadies grief with resurrection expectation.
gcb.fire: The return of Christ burns through despair.

text: That day shall not come, except there come a falling away first.

gcb.mirror: Warning reveals that endurance must be conscious, not assumed.
gcb.water: Discernment keeps the Church from drifting.
gcb.fire: Truth burns through deception before the day comes.

text: Be thou an example of the believers.

gcb.mirror: Leadership reveals itself through embodied example.
gcb.water: Discipleship orders the life before it orders others.
gcb.fire: Example burns away empty authority.

text: All scripture is given by inspiration of God.

gcb.mirror: Scripture reveals divine speech preserved for formation.
gcb.water: The word orders doctrine, correction, and growth.
gcb.fire: Scripture burns through human speculation.

text: Not by works of righteousness which we have done, but according to his mercy he saved us.

gcb.mirror: Mercy reveals the true source of salvation.
gcb.water: Grace washes salvation clean of self-righteousness.
gcb.fire: Mercy burns through pride.

text: Not now as a servant, but above a servant, a brother beloved.

gcb.mirror: The gospel reveals new social reality in Christ.
gcb.water: Brotherhood reorders relationships under grace.
gcb.fire: Reconciliation burns through old hierarchies.

text: Behold, the days come, saith the Lord, when I will make a new covenant.

gcb.mirror: Christ reveals the covenant promised before.
gcb.water: Fulfillment orders old and new without confusion.
gcb.fire: The better covenant burns through shadows by bringing substance.

text: Be ye doers of the word, and not hearers only.

gcb.mirror: The word reveals whether hearing has become life.
gcb.water: Obedience orders truth into action.
gcb.fire: Practice burns through self-deception.

text: Be ye holy; for I am holy.

gcb.mirror: Holiness reveals what it means to belong to God.
gcb.water: Sanctification orders the people through consecration.
gcb.fire: Holiness burns through compromise.

text: Holy men of God spake as they were moved by the Holy Ghost.

gcb.mirror: Divine inspiration reveals scripture as carried by God.
gcb.water: The Spirit orders prophetic speech into trustworthy witness.
gcb.fire: Inspiration burns through reductionist readings of scripture.

text: God is love.

gcb.mirror: Love reveals the character of God, not merely His gifts.
gcb.water: Divine love cleanses the meaning of relationship.
gcb.fire: Love burns through fear and false communion.

text: And this is love, that we walk after his commandments.

gcb.mirror: Love reveals itself through ordered obedience, not abstraction.
gcb.water: Truth gives form to love.
gcb.fire: Obedience burns away sentimental distortion.

text: I have no greater joy than to hear that my children walk in truth.

gcb.mirror: Truth reveals itself in lived faithfulness.
gcb.water: Walking in truth orders joy into discipleship.
gcb.fire: Truth burns through empty profession.

text: And Enoch also, the seventh from Adam, prophesied of these.

gcb.mirror: Judgment reveals continuity between canonical witness and ancient warning.
gcb.water: The citation clarifies the breadth of scriptural memory.
gcb.fire: Watchfulness burns through complacency.

text: I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the ending.

gcb.mirror: Christ reveals Himself as Lord over beginning and end.
gcb.water: Apocalyptic revelation orders history under eternal identity.
gcb.fire: The end burns in the light of the One who holds all.

text: And God shall wipe away all tears from their eyes; and there shall be no more death.

gcb.mirror: The final victory reveals the true end of grief and death.
gcb.water: New creation cleanses the last effects of curse and loss.
gcb.fire: Final restoration burns away every remnant of death.

text: Blessed are the poor in spirit: for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.

gcb.mirror: The kingdom begins with the recognition of spiritual poverty.
gcb.water: Humility opens the soul to divine ordering.
gcb.fire: Kingdom life burns away pride.

text: Blessed are the peacemakers: for they shall be called the children of God.

gcb.mirror: Peace reveals the character of God's kingdom.
gcb.water: Peacemaking orders relationships toward reconciliation.
gcb.fire: True peace burns through hostility and pride.

text: Ye are the light of the world. A city that is set on an hill cannot be hid.

gcb.mirror: Disciples reveal whether divine light is actually being reflected.
gcb.water: Witness orders public life around visible truth.
gcb.fire: Light burns through concealment and compromise.

text: Think not that I am come to destroy the law, or the prophets: I am not come to destroy, but to fulfil.

gcb.mirror: Christ reveals continuity rather than destruction in God's redemptive plan.
gcb.water: Fulfillment orders law and prophecy into their true meaning.
gcb.fire: Fulfillment burns through shallow readings of scripture.
